caption: A person's hands interact with a black "OBSIDIAN" sports card box resting on a red and black themed surface. In the background, a man wearing a black shirt is visible in a separate screen inset. The surface features the logo "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM". As the action progresses, the person's hands slide a green and black card out from the box. The card features a basketball player and bears the text "2 AUTOGRAPHS!". The person continues to pull the card fully from its packaging, revealing a dark interior within the box. The scene is set in a professional breaking environment with multiple monitors and equipment visible in the background of the inset view. The focus remains on the tactile process of removing the collectible card from the Obsidian branded box.
